principles.title: Logical Isolation
principles.description: The VPC provides a logically isolated section of the AWS Cloud where you can launch AWS resources in a virtual network that you define.

principles.title: Custom Address Space
principles.description: Complete control over your IP address range, subnets, and configuration of route tables and network gateways.

principles.title: Security by Design
principles.description: Foundation for multiple layers of security, including security groups and network access control lists.

metadata.description: Create a standalone VPC with configurable CIDR, DNS settings, and instance tenancy. This is an atomic resource containing only the VPC itself - no subnets, gateways, or route tables.
metadata.title: VPC

configuration.description: Create a standalone VPC with configurable CIDR, DNS settings, and instance tenancy. This is an atomic resource containing only the VPC itself - no subnets, gateways, or route tables.

cidrBlock.title: VPC CIDR Block
cidrBlock.description: IPv4 CIDR block for the VPC

enableDnsSupport.title: Enable DNS Support
enableDnsSupport.description: Enable DNS resolution in the VPC

enableDnsHostnames.title: Enable DNS Hostnames
enableDnsHostnames.description: Enable DNS hostnames in the VPC

instanceTenancy.title: Instance Tenancy
instanceTenancy.description: Tenancy option for instances launched into the VPC

resources.name: unknown
resources.description: Virtual Private Cloud with DNS support
